structure: trivial mod 9; order-9 subgroup of (Z/37)^* (pure cyclotomic mod-37)
reason: no two-square obstruction (quartic Gaussian periods are non-integer); row sum +/-1 reachable; 37- and 9-compression relaxations feasible; exact CP-SAT did not terminate within budget and found no LP.

exact_attempts.engine: CP-SAT column-type model (Z9 x Z37) + symmetry breaking
CP-SAT column-type model (Z9 x Z37), no symmetry breaking

note: No LP found in any attempt; almost certainly a hard UNSAT, but reported OPEN (not proved).

resolution.method: 9-compression obstruction using the exact K37-invariance column-sum value set V={+-1,+-17,+-19,+-35,+-37}
key_facts: Column sums atilde_j in V (K37-invariance, orbit sizes 1,9,9,9,9).
Compression identity => PAF_atilde(s)+PAF_btilde(s) = -74 for s=1..8; row sums +-1.
Forced squared-norm 594 has a UNIQUE V-square multiset 16x1+2x289 => exactly two |.|=17 columns, sixteen |.|=1.
Exhaustive search over 2,540,160 compressed pairs finds 0 solutions.
resolution.why_open_before: prior 9-compression relaxation treated column sums as free odd integers (842 square-multisets for 594); the K37 value-set restriction was the missing ingredient.
